name: Applesauce Bread Pudding.
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Bread (a loaf minus a few slices), cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss bread cubes with the cinnamon and raisins in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together milk, apple sauce, egg whites, brown sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread cubes. Let the mixture stand for 25 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Spray an 8x8x2 inch baking pan with Pam cooking spray.
5. Add the bread mixture to the prepared baking pan.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
7. Let set for 15-20 minutes before serving.
